title: Klarna Taps Into Growing Demand for Conscious Beauty with Expanded Shopping Filter and Ratings by Good On You
full_text:
Klarna Taps Into Growing Demand for Conscious Beauty with Expanded Shopping Filters and Ratings by Good On You

London, UK – March 19, 2026 – Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, is expanding its Conscious shopping filters to include beauty within the Klarna app and web. Powered by ratings from Good On You, a leading independent source on retail brand sustainability, the expansion builds on several years of partnership that helps millions of consumers make smarter shopping choices. Klarna first introduced the Conscious filter for the fashion category using Good On You ratings, and is now expanding the feature to include beauty brands.

The expansion comes as sustainability increasingly shapes beauty purchase decisions. In the UK, a January 2026 British Beauty Council and UNiDAYS survey found that 43% of Gen Z consumers consider sustainability "extremely" or "very" important when buying beauty products. In the US, over 65% of consumers now actively seek out more conscious beauty brands.

Beauty brands rated 4 (“Good”) or 5 (“Great”) by Good On You* will now be visible in the “Conscious” filter in the Klarna app and shopping browser, and be clearly identified on in-app brand pages. This makes it effortless for shoppers to discover conscious beauty brands in one place without having to do the research themselves.

Good On You’s ratings are based on a comprehensive methodology that evaluates brands across three key areas: people, the planet, and animals. Using publicly available information — including brand disclosures, certifications, and third-party sustainability indices —, Good On You assesses 500+ data points across more than 40 issues in cosmetic and personal care products’ value chains spanning supply chains, environmental impact, worker welfare, and animal protection. Brands receiving a score of 4 (“Good”) or 5 (“Great”) demonstrate strong policies and practices addressing these impacts across their value chains.

“Beauty is one of the fastest-growing and most dynamic retail categories,” said Louisa Garcia Moreno, Sustainability Communications Lead at Klarna. “By bringing trusted ratings into the Klarna app, we’re helping people make more informed beauty choices in seconds, without having to do hours of research themselves.” 

“Access to reliable sustainability information is critical in beauty,” said Sandra Capponi, co-founder at Good On You. “By integrating our ratings into Klarna’s platform, more consumers can discover beauty brands that are taking meaningful action on environmental and social issues.”

With over 118 million active consumers globally, Klarna continues to expand beyond payments - combining discovery, transparency, and flexible payments in one seamless experience.

The expanded Conscious category is available now to Klarna users worldwide through the Klarna app and shopping browser.

*Find more information on Good On You’s rating system here.
